import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import PageHeader from "../common/PageHeader"; import { api } from "../../services/api"; export default function Rendimiento() { const [data, setData] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { api.getPerformance().then(res => { setData((res || []).map(r => ({ id: r.id, concurrency: r.concurrency, requests: r.requests, success: r.success, error_rate: r.error_rate_percent, avg_ms: r.avg_ms, p95_ms: r.p95_ms, max_ms: r.max_ms, acceptance: !!r.acceptance, date: r.created_at ? r.created_at.slice(0, 10) : "", }))); }).catch(() => { }).finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); const ultimo = data[0] || {}; const criterioClass = ultimo.acceptance ? "text-success" : "text-danger"; const criterioLabel = ultimo.acceptance ? "Cumple" : "No cumple"; if (loading) return
; return (
